name: Skill: Model migration guide
desc: Guides the agent through migrating Claude API requests from older models to the 4.6/4.7 family, highlighting parameter updates and API deprecations.

name: Data: Claude model catalog
desc: Lists and maps placeholders for friendly model names to official Anthropic Claude model version strings.

name: Data: Claude API reference — Python
desc: Python SDK reference documentation for Claude, detailing basic requests, streaming, tool calling, and prompt caching.

name: Data: Claude API reference — TypeScript
desc: TypeScript/JavaScript SDK reference documentation for Claude, detailing client setup, streaming, and tool runners.

name: Data: Claude API reference — Go
desc: Go SDK reference documentation for Claude, covering connection configuration, streaming, and tool use.

name: Data: Claude API reference — cURL
desc: Raw HTTP and cURL request/response examples for the Anthropic Messages API.

name: Data: Claude API reference — C#
desc: C# SDK reference documentation for Claude, detailing setup, basic requests, and tool use.

name: Data: Claude API reference — Java
desc: Java SDK reference documentation for Claude, detailing client setup, Maven/Gradle dependencies, and tool use.

name: Data: Claude API reference — PHP
desc: PHP SDK reference documentation for Claude, detailing installation, Bedrock/Vertex clients, and tool runners.

name: Data: Claude API reference — Ruby
desc: Ruby SDK reference documentation for Claude, detailing setup, basic requests, and tool runners.

name: Data: Claude Platform on AWS reference
desc: Reference documentation for accessing the Anthropic Claude developer platform hosted on AWS infrastructure (SigV4 signing, IAM access, and workspaces).

name: Data: Message Batches API reference — Python
desc: Reference for the async Messages Batches API to run high-volume offline requests at 50% discount.

name: Data: Streaming reference — Python
desc: Reference for Python SDK streaming and event handling including text, thoughts, and tool deltas.

name: Data: Streaming reference — TypeScript
desc: Reference for TypeScript SDK streaming, tool runners with streaming, and raw Server-Sent Events (SSE) formats.

name: Data: Tool use concepts
desc: Explains the conceptual foundations of tool use, schema definitions, custom tool choice, manual loops vs. tool runner, handling tool results, and server-side tools (Code Execution, Web Search, Web Fetch, Computer Use, Advisor).

name: Data: Tool use reference — Python
desc: Python reference code for tool use, including the @beta_tool decorator, MCP tool conversion helpers (async_mcp_tool), manual agentic loops, error handling in tool results, code execution tool results, memory tool helpers, and structured outputs using Pydantic.

name: Data: Tool use reference — TypeScript
desc: TypeScript reference code for tool use, detailing betaZodTool, client.beta.messages.toolRunner(), manual agentic loops, streaming loops with finalMessage(), server-side tools types matching (ToolUnion), structured outputs with Zod, and strict tool use.

name: Data: Files API reference — Python
desc: Python reference guide for Anthropic's Files API, describing file upload, file usage in messages (document/image content blocks), listing, retrieving metadata, downloading, and deleting files.

name: Data: Files API reference — TypeScript
desc: TypeScript reference guide for Anthropic's Files API, detailing file upload, document blocks, listing, deleting, and downloading files in TypeScript.

name: Skill: Build with Claude API (reference guide)
desc: A reference guide template routing Claude to language-specific folders and files depending on the task type (e.g. streaming, long-running conversations, prompt caching, tool use, batch processing, files API, managed agents, error handling).

name: Skill: Building LLM-powered applications with Claude
desc: Main orchestrator prompt for building LLM applications, guiding language detection, interface selection, model defaults (Opus 4.7/4.6, adaptive thinking, effort configurations), prompt compaction, caching, managed agents vs. raw API, and avoiding non-Anthropic providers.

name: Skill: Run library SDK example
desc: Provides an example template for running, building, testing, and verifying a library/SDK from source instead of a web server application.

name: Skill: Run web server API example
desc: Provides an example template for starting, verifying, and stopping a background web server/API process cleanly without blocking the shell.

name: Skill: Update Claude Code Config
desc: Instructs on how to configure and modify Claude Code's settings.json file, specifically regarding permissions default modes, environment variables, MCP servers, and hooks (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreCompact, PostCompact, Stop, SessionStart).

name: Skill: Verify server/API changes (example for Verify skill)
desc: An example template demonstrating how to verify API modifications (like rate limit headers) by triggering code paths and analyzing output responses.

name: Tool Description: REPL
desc: Describes the REPL tool, a JavaScript programming interface allowing the agent to loop, branch, and orchestrate other tool calls programmatically in a secure VM context.

name: Tool Description: TodoWrite
desc: Describes the TodoWrite tool used by the agent to proactively create and manage a structured task list (pending, in_progress, completed) for complex multi-turn coding sessions.

name: Tool Description: WebFetch
desc: Describes the WebFetch tool for retrieving web content from URLs, converting it to markdown, summarizing large pages, and handling redirects.

name: Tool Description: Workflow
desc: Describes the Workflow tool for writing and executing deterministic multi-subagent orchestration scripts in Javascript (using pipeline, parallel, phase, and agent hooks) with concurrency caps and token budgets.

name: Agent Prompt: CLAUDE.md creation
desc: System prompt guiding the analysis of codebases to create or improve a CLAUDE.md instruction file containing common build/test/lint commands and high-level architecture details, without including generic advice or discoverable structures.

name: Agent Prompt: Onboarding guide draft share link workflow
desc: Step-by-step instructions for utilizing a custom onboarding guide share tool to generate a shareable draft link, prompt the user for feedback questions, and subsequently update the shared link with final content.

name: Agent Prompt: Onboarding guide generator
desc: Collaborative wizard prompt that scans a user's recent session histories, classifies tasks into standard categories, and generates a draft team onboarding guide (ONBOARDING.md) with ASCII progress visualizations.

name: Agent Prompt: Workflow subagent plain text output
desc: System prompt instructing subagents executed by workflow scripts to return their final output verbatim as a plain string, without conversational fluff, confirmations, or markdown code blocks.

name: Agent Prompt: Workflow subagent structured output
desc: Prompt directing workflow subagents to return their results solely by calling a dedicated StructuredOutput tool exactly once, validating inputs against the required JSON schema.

name: Skill: /init CLAUDE.md and skill setup (new version)
desc: A comprehensive onboarding flow for setting up project-specific instructions (CLAUDE.md), personal user configs (CLAUDE.local.md), skills, git worktree mapping, formatters, and lifecycle hooks.

name: Skill: Team onboarding guide
desc: A Markdown template and agent instructions that welcome a new teammate, displaying developer usage statistics, setup checklists, MCP integrations, and team workflows.

name: Skill: Agent Design Patterns
desc: Reference manual outlining core architectural patterns, parameter heuristics (thinking, effort), tool design (bash vs specialized), programmatic tool calling (PTC), context management (compaction, editing), and caching strategy.

name: Skill: Run app
desc: Guidance instructing the agent on how to launch and interact with the application runtime (CLI, Server, TUI, GUI, Library) to verify changes, rather than relying solely on test suites.

name: Skill: Run skill generator
desc: System instructions for generating or improving a project-specific 'run' skill composed of a SKILL.md guide and an executable runner/driver script.

name: Data: Anthropic CLI
desc: Reference documentation for the Anthropic CLI ('ant'), documenting commands for managing agents, environments, sessions, and files, along with shell scripting and streaming patterns.

name: Data: Assistant voice and values template
desc: Template guiding the assistant's voice and developer-centric values, focusing on extreme conciseness, technical precision, collaborative partnership, and honesty when stuck.

name: Data: Live documentation sources
desc: Registry of URLs and extraction queries for scraping real-time Claude API details, feature guides, and SDK repository schemas on-demand.
